channel.title: AI News — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Daily AI news digest — curated headlines, summaries and trends

item.title: Usage-based pricing killing your vibe - here's how to roll your own local AI coding agents
item.description: As AI model developers shift to usage-based pricing, hobbyists face increased costs for local coding projects. The article suggests alternatives for cost-saving local AI coding agents.

item.title: Disneyland Now Uses Face Recognition on Visitors
item.description: Disneyland has implemented facial recognition technology for visitors, raising privacy concerns. This move reflects a growing trend of surveillance in public spaces.

item.title: UK drivers' agency shrugs off claims of week-long booking site smashes, blames browser configs
item.description: The UK's DVSA is facing backlash over its driving test booking system, which users report has been offline for days. The agency attributes the issues to browser configurations.

item.title: Brace for the patch tsunami: AI is unearthing decades of buried code debt
item.description: Britain's cyber agency warns that AI is uncovering long-hidden software flaws, leading to a surge in necessary patches. This could overwhelm cybersecurity defenses.

item.title: Friday: Hili dialogue
item.description: This article features a whimsical take on the 'Lusty Month of May' from the musical 'Camelot', showcasing a performance by Julie Andrews.

item.title: obsly-ai 0.9.4
item.description: The release of obsly-ai 0.9.4 introduces AI code intelligence features, including token tracking and cost analysis for various coding platforms.

item.title: Show HN: Git-issues – Issue tracker that lives in your repo as Markdown
item.description: A developer introduces 'git-issues', a new issue tracker that integrates with repositories as Markdown, aiming to streamline project management.

item.title: attune-ai 6.5.3
item.description: Attune-ai 6.5.3 offers AI-powered workflows for developers, focusing on cost optimization and automation, enhancing productivity.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) reveals $573M web of transactions between Elon Musk’s companies
item.description: Tesla's financial filings reveal $573 million in transactions among Elon Musk's companies, indicating a complex financial ecosystem.

item.title: Pentagon reaches agreements with top AI companies, but not Anthropic
item.description: The Pentagon has secured agreements with seven AI companies to enhance its classified networks, excluding Anthropic, as it expands its AI capabilities.

item.title: Pentagon reaches agreements with leading AI companies
item.description: The Pentagon has signed agreements with seven major AI companies, including OpenAI and Google, to integrate their technologies into classified defense networks. This partnership aims to enhance national security through advanced AI capabilities.

item.title: siglume-agent-core added to PyPI
item.description: The siglume-agent-core has been added to PyPI, providing an open-core orchestrator for the Siglume API Store agent runtime. This tool includes quality scoring and adapters for various LLM providers.

item.title: parallel-orchestra 0.1.2
item.description: The parallel-orchestra 0.1.2 update allows users to run Claude Code agents in parallel using a YAML-frontmatter Markdown manifest. It includes features for git worktree isolation during write tasks.

item.title: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Pushes Back on AI Job-Destruction Fears, Arguing Software Engineers Solve Problems, Also Admits Zero China Share
item.description: NVIDIA's CEO Jensen Huang has countered fears about AI-related job losses, asserting that AI will create numerous job opportunities while addressing the company's reduced market share in China. He emphasizes the economic benefits of AI for the U.S.

item.title: langchain-acp 0.9.2
item.description: The langchain-acp 0.9.2 release exposes LangChain and LangGraph agents through the ACP Kit, enhancing accessibility for developers working with these frameworks.

item.title: OpenAI introduces security feature removing passwords, SMS and email recovery
item.description: OpenAI has launched Advanced Account Security for ChatGPT, replacing traditional passwords and SMS recovery with more secure authentication methods. This aims to enhance user account protection.

item.title: puvinoise-sdk 0.3.46
item.description: The puvinoise-sdk 0.3.46 has been released as an independent OpenTelemetry SDK for AI agents, supporting platforms like Anthropic and OpenAI. This SDK aims to improve observability for AI applications.

item.title: I replaced ChatGPT and Claude with this powerful local LLM and saved over $20 a month while gaining full control
item.description: A user has successfully replaced ChatGPT and Claude with the local LLM Qwen3.6, which runs on older hardware and offers similar functionalities for free, saving over $20 monthly.

item.title: Everyone’s switching from ChatGPT to Claude — but new tests say neither is the smartest free AI, and the real winner might surprise you
item.description: Recent tests suggest that while many are switching from ChatGPT to Claude, neither may be the smartest free AI, with performance varying by task. This challenges prevailing assumptions about AI superiority.

item.title: OpenAI is Now Sharing Its Users’ Data With Advertisers
item.description: OpenAI's updated privacy policy now allows for user data sharing with advertisers, coinciding with a rise in uninstalls of ChatGPT. This move has raised concerns about user privacy.

item.title: The fruit fly cancer researcher who built his first prototype out of lollipop sticks and straws
item.description: Biomedical scientist Caíque Costa is using fruit flies to research cancer, highlighting the complexities of maintaining these organisms in a lab setting.

item.title: SpaceX has spent more than $15 billion on Starship and is racing to make rocketry resemble an airline schedule
item.description: SpaceX has invested over $15 billion in its Starship project, aiming to make space travel as routine as airline flights, according to recent reports.

item.title: How Google Gemini’s New Canvas Dashboard is Completely Changing File Creation
item.description: Google Gemini's new Canvas Dashboard enhances file creation and management, supporting various formats like PDFs and Word documents, improving user experience.

item.title: The Tech Download: Chip stocks surge in ‘historic’ month as investors’ AI buildout concerns ease
item.description: Chip stocks rebounded in April after a challenging March, easing investor concerns about the AI buildout's impact on the semiconductor market.

item.title: Save a huge $400 on this Acer Predator OLED gaming laptop with an RTX 5070 Ti and 32GB DDR5, now under $1,800 — big saving on Helios Neo 16S AI rig that ships with a 24-core Intel CPU, 1TB SSD, and a 240Hz refresh rate
item.description: Best Buy is offering a $400 discount on the Acer Predator Helios Neo 16S gaming laptop, featuring high-end specs like an RTX 5070 Ti and a 240Hz display.

item.title: euler-loading 2.7.0
item.description: The release of euler-loading 2.7.0 introduces a multi-modal PyTorch dataloader that utilizes ds-crawler indices for improved data handling.

item.title: Show HN: Revdoku – visual document review with AI (open-source)
item.description: Revdoku is an open-source AI tool designed for visual document review, allowing users to efficiently manage and analyze documents.

item.title: This open-source AI app cleans out my inbox, and doesn't steal my data
item.description: An open-source AI application successfully cleans up email inboxes without compromising user data, offering a privacy-focused solution.

item.title: Everyone keeps talking about AI taking jobs. We put it to the test.
item.description: A BI experiment tested an AI bot's ability to replace a human role, revealing that AI is not yet a threat to job security in this context.

item.title: B2BROKER Group Puts AI at the Core of B2TRADER as Technology Enters a New Era
item.description: B2BROKER Group has integrated AI into its B2TRADER platform, marking a significant upgrade in fintech solutions for financial institutions.

item.title: The 2026 AI Index: Capability Without Accountability Is Not Progress
item.description: The 2026 AI Index from Stanford highlights rapid AI capability growth in 2025, but warns that monitoring and accountability measures have not kept up. This imbalance raises concerns about the implications of unchecked AI advancements.

item.title: ChatGPT OpenAI Elon Musk trial: From calling Artificial Intelligence firm charity to existential crisis, key takeaways from Tesla boss' testimony
item.description: During a trial, Elon Musk characterized OpenAI as a charity and claimed that its leaders, Altman and Brockman, failed to uphold their commitment to a nonprofit model. This testimony reflects ongoing tensions regarding AI governance and ethical responsibilities.

item.title: etherion-tui 0.1.11
item.description: The article introduces etherion-tui 0.1.11, a terminal user interface for the Etherion AI platform, enhancing user interaction with the platform's capabilities.

item.title: torchax 0.0.12.dev20260501
item.description: Torchax 0.0.12.dev20260501 is a library designed to enable the simultaneous use of Jax and PyTorch, facilitating more flexible AI model development.

item.title: Show HN: Loopsy, a way for terminals and AI agents on different machines to talk
item.description: Loopsy is a new tool that allows communication between terminals and AI agents on different machines, initially aimed at file transfer and command execution, enhancing resource utilization.

item.title: langchain-cosmergon 0.1.1
item.description: Langchain-cosmergon 0.1.1 introduces a framework for integrating agent economies with LangChain and CrewAI-compatible tools, expanding the ecosystem for AI agents.

item.title: unichat 4.3.4
item.description: Unichat 4.3.4 is a universal API chat client for various AI providers, enabling seamless communication across different AI platforms.

item.title: isat-tuner 0.11.0
item.description: ISAT-tuner 0.11.0 is a command-line interface that optimizes AI inference processes through various advanced techniques, improving performance and efficiency.

item.title: Twilio stock soared to its highest level in 4 years. Its CEO shares how AI helped the company turn things around.
item.description: Twilio's stock reached a four-year high, attributed to the successful implementation of its AI strategy, which helped the company recover from previous growth challenges.

item.title: nil-sdk added to PyPI
item.description: The nil-sdk has been added to PyPI, offering a self-evolving domain agent framework that improves AI agents with each execution, enhancing their capabilities over time.

item.title: Key takeaways from Musk's testimony at OpenAI trial
item.description: Elon Musk testified for over seven hours in a trial concerning OpenAI, arguing that his lawsuit is a defense of charitable giving. His statements may influence the future direction of AI governance and funding.

item.title: attune-rag 0.1.10
item.description: The attune-rag 0.1.10 is a lightweight, LLM-agnostic retrieval-augmented generation pipeline that supports various large language models. This flexibility allows developers to integrate it with different AI systems.

item.title: Reddit Q1 revenue jumps 69% to $663m, and shares rally 9%
item.description: Reddit's Q1 revenue surged by 69% to $663 million, exceeding Wall Street expectations and prompting a 9% increase in shares. The platform's strong performance contrasts with broader tech industry trends.

item.title: litsynth added to PyPI
item.description: Litsynth has been added to PyPI, offering systematic review and literature analysis tools. This addition enhances research workflows by providing citation-safe options.

item.title: nvidia-nat-langchain 1.7.0a20260501
item.description: The nvidia-nat-langchain 1.7.0a20260501 is a subpackage that integrates LangChain with the NeMo Agent Toolkit, enhancing natural language processing capabilities.

item.title: 1 crore in 15 years: I asked ChatGPT how to plan my SIP as an Engineer from Bengaluru; Check realistic results from AI
item.description: A Bengaluru engineer sought advice from ChatGPT on planning a systematic investment plan (SIP) to accumulate 1 crore in 15 years. The AI provided realistic financial strategies.

item.title: Subsidize, Build, Export, Repeat
item.description: The article critiques America's approach to AI, highlighting the cycle of subsidizing, building, and exporting AI technologies without addressing actual demand. It raises questions about the sustainability of this model.

item.title: Advanced Quantization Algorithm for LLMs
item.description: A new state-of-the-art quantization algorithm for large language models (LLMs) has been developed, optimizing inference for various hardware platforms while maintaining high accuracy.

item.title: sigil-sdk-langchain 0.2.0
item.description: The sigil-sdk-langchain 0.2.0 provides callback handlers for the Sigil Python SDK within the LangChain framework, facilitating smoother integration for developers.

item.title: Why Rezolve AI (RZLV) Is Expanding Its Commerce AI Platform Through Microsoft Foundry
item.description: Rezolve AI is expanding its commerce AI platform through collaboration with Microsoft Foundry, aiming to enhance its offerings and reach in the market.
